issues: The drafted headline 'Tomlinson Obtained by Winnipeg Jets in Three-Way Trade' does not appear in the OCR — it is AI-invented. There is no clear standalone headline visible in the OCR text.
Rich Chernomaz's point total is stated as '74 points with Salt Lake City of the IHL' in the OCR, but the draft omits this detail entirely (minor omission, not an error per se).
The draft says Chernomaz was 'named player/assistant coach of the St. John's Maple Leafs' — this is accurate per OCR.
The draft correctly identifies Bruce Boudreau as named coach of Fort Wayne Komets, but the OCR specifies he is a 'Former New Brunswick Hawk' — this context is missing from the draft.
The draft does not mention Jason Cirone, who is central to the trade mechanism described in the article.
The draft's short description is broadly accurate but omits the Moncton Hawks/AHL framing that is the article's focus.
review.correctedDescriptionShort: Moncton Hawks coach Rob Laird acquires ex-Sockeye Dave Tomlinson via a three-way trade involving the Winnipeg Jets, Florida Panthers, and Toronto Maple Leafs.
review.correctedDescriptionLong: Moncton Hawks (AHL) coach Rob Laird expresses enthusiasm about acquiring centre Dave Tomlinson — a former Richmond Sockeye — who scored 84 points in 70 games for the St. John's Maple Leafs. Tomlinson, 24, was traded by the Maple Leafs to the expansion Florida Panthers for a future draft pick, then dealt to the Winnipeg Jets organization (Moncton Hawks) for centre Jason Cirone. The article also notes former New Brunswick Hawk Bruce Boudreau named coach of the Fort Wayne Komets (IHL), Rich Chernomaz named player/assistant coach of the St. John's Maple Leafs, and veteran Dave Poulin signing with the Washington Capitals.
review.notes: No clear headline is visible in the OCR — the AI-drafted headline appears to be fabricated. The byline "By Dwayne Tingley" is confirmed. Dave Tomlinson is a known Sockeyes alumnus, making this archive-relevant. The OCR also contains adjacent-column noise (Flyers/Vilgrain content) which the draft correctly ignores.
